content.en:
Time passed, and dozens of extradimensional eras passed.

this day.

A piece of news detonated the entire 5,000 Territory and the surrounding territories.

This news involves a relatively complete method of inheritance of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and its value is far from being comparable to the black fog multi-dimensional body.

The reason was that a group of third-realm beings broke into an ancient ruin, suspected to be the ruins of the fourth realm, and as a result, an innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance was found in the ruins, and was obtained by one of the third realms.

And somehow, this matter was exposed.

Suddenly, the third realm was targeted, and a large number of forces wanted to take down the third realm and seize this innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance.

Now, some of the Fourth Realms have been dispatched, constantly deducing the traces of the other party.

But the third realm is also prepared, and the fourth realm cannot locate its specific location, and can only roughly determine which extradimensional territory it is located in.

In short, it's a complete mess now.

Ye Tian was also the first to go out, and after hearing the name of the third realm, he also shouted that it was too much of a coincidence.

"Holy Sea Realm Lord!"

This third realm is the one who hit the Kuntong Realm Lord hard, and the other party has been chasing and killing the Kuntong Realm Lord in order to snatch the black statue and severely damage the Kuntong Realm Lord.

Eventually, the Kuntong Realm Lord fell and died shortly after escaping.

Ye Tian obtained the treasure left by the Kuntong Realm Lord, and also made an oath to kill the Holy Sea Realm Lord in the future.

In these years, he didn't go to inquire about the Holy Sea Realm Lord, but now he unexpectedly found out.

"After such a long time, the Holy Sea Realm Lord is still in the third realm, I thought it was possible for him to reach the fourth realm. "

Ye Tian knew that he had overestimated the Holy Sea Realm Lord, but it was reasonable that the other party did not break through to the fourth realm, if it was so easy to break through to the fourth realm, the existence of the fourth realm would not be so rare.

However, after all, the Holy Sea Realm Lord is the third realm that has existed for countless years, and his cultivation has reached the peak of the third realm, and the realm of extradimensional rules is unknown, but it is definitely not low.

Moreover, he is a high-level super-dimensional soldier, and his combat effectiveness is very terrifying.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian should not be the opponent of the Holy Sea Realm Lord now, but after cultivating the copy body of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, he may be able to compete with the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

But it's just a contest of one or two, and it is naturally impossible to kill the Holy Sea Realm Lord and seize the relatively complete innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance.

Another extradimensional epoch has passed.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord was still not found by the Fourth Realm, but there was new news coming in.

The reason why the Holy Sea Realm Lord was treated like this, and they all wanted to obtain his innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, was because this innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance was not simple, it was a special kind of innate multi-dimensional Dao body.

Once this innate multi-dimensional Dao body is cultivated, the physical body will be strengthened by thirty times, and it has a recovery speed that exceeds ten times that of the past, and the most important point is that this innate multi-dimensional Dao body comes with an innate multi-dimensional secret technique - multi-dimensional wisdom light!

The multi-dimensional wisdom light can make the comprehension get a terrifying improvement, and it is naturally many times easier to comprehend the extradimensional rules, but if such an innate multi-dimensional secret technique is performed many times, the price is not small, it will squeeze the potential of the body, once it is used too many times, this innate multi-dimensional Dao body will directly squeeze out all the potential of the body, and the physical body will dry up and die.

In addition, even if the number of casts is less, it will also affect the impact of the fourth realm, unless you don't cast the multi-dimensional wisdom light once, you can hope to impact the fourth realm.

But if you really have cultivated such an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, how can you give up the temptation to quickly improve your strength!

"This innate multi-dimensional Dao body is more valuable to me.!"

"The Holy Sea Realm Lord is really not simple, when he was able to encounter that extremely mysterious black statue, he almost obtained it, and now he has obtained that special innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance. In the normal third realm, it is impossible to encounter such an opportunity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It's a pity that the Holy Sea Realm Lord has the opportunity to encounter a great opportunity, but he may not be able to grasp it.

For example, this time, although he obtained the innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, he also leaked it, causing many extra-dimensional realms to know about it, and he was also targeted by the fourth realm.

If it was another third realm, he would have been caught a long time ago. []

But even if the Holy Sea Realm Lord has not been discovered yet, it is not easy to hide and cultivate with peace of mind.

What's more, even if he has obtained the innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, it is not easy to cultivate, and he even needs some auxiliary things, once he is strictly stared at by those forces, the Holy Sea Realm Lord will not dare to look for them at all.

"Let's go to the territory of 509 first!"

Ye Tian immediately rushed over.

According to rumors, the Holy Sea Realm Lord is there.

......

Territory of Five Thousand and Nine.

An extradimensional realm.

The five Fourth Realms sat here chatting, discussing the affairs of the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

"Are you really sure that it is the innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body?"

A Fourth Realm asked.

"It is indeed this innate multi-dimensional Dao body, but it should be missing the last layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body inheritance, the real Ka Ye wisdom body inheritance has three layers, and there should only be two layers of strength that have been handed down. "

"Two layers are enough, as long as the first layer is not missing, then you can cultivate. Even the two-layer innate multi-dimensional Dao body is much more powerful than those garbage innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, just like the black mist multi-dimensional body, which is only one layer, and it is relatively incomplete. "

"Not to mention the garbage innate multi-dimensional Dao body of the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, cultivating the incomplete innate multi-dimensional Dao body is self-destructing the future, and it can only be cultivated for those juniors who have no hope of the fourth realm. However, the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Kasa is extraordinary, as long as we do not exert multi-dimensional wisdom light, it will not affect the impact of the fifth realm in the future. "

"The two-layer realm of the Ka Ye wisdom body, cultivated to the limit, can increase the physical body by up to 200 times, if we can cultivate this innate multi-dimensional Dao body and cultivate it to the limit, the combat power can be comparable to the existence that has not been trained into the innate multi-dimensional Dao body and has just entered the fifth realm!"

"So, we must catch that guy from the Holy Sea Realm Lord!"

"Continue to deduce the location of the Holy Sea Realm Lord, you must find him, the two layers of Ka Ye wisdom body are enough to attract the existence of the Fifth Realm. There are also some border barriers between the No. 5,000 territory and the No. 4,000 territory, and the fourth realm is not easy to pass, and the news cannot be transmitted. Otherwise, if they really let them know, they will definitely send the Fifth Realm over. At that point, we will not be eligible for this inheritance. "。
